content.text: Missing import `fields` ในไฟล์ `payment_wizard.py` ครับ คุณ Ball

content.content:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from odoo import api, models


class PaymentWizard(models.TransientModel):
    _name = 'buz.pos.payment.wizard'
    _description = 'Quick Payment Registration for POS'

    order_id = fields.Many2one('pos.order', string='Order', required=True)
    payment_method = fields.Selection([
        ('cash', 'Cash'),
        ('transfer', 'Bank Transfer'),
        ('card', 'Credit/Debit Card'),
    ], required=True, default='cash')

content.content: The error is about an xpath expression that can't find the element `//page[@id='payment_page']` in the parent view. Let me check the XML file and the parent view to understand the correct xpath.

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<odoo>
    <!-- POS Config: Buz POS Settings -->
    <record id="pos_config_view_form_buz" model="ir.ui.view">
        <field name="name">pos.config.form.buz.pos.core</field>
        <field name="model">pos.config</field>
        <field name="inherit_id" ref="point_of_sale.pos_config_view_form"/>
        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//page[@id='payment_page']" position="after">
                <page id="buz_pos_settings_page" name="Buz POS" string="Buz POS Settings">
                    <group>
                        <group string="Payment Settings">
                            <field name="buz_enable_multi_payment"/>
                        </group>
                        <group string="Order Settings">
                            <field name="buz_enable_order_note"/>
                            <field name="buz_enable_line_discount"/>
                            <field name="buz_default_discount"/>
                        </group>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <group string="Receipt Settings">
                            <field name="buz_receipt_show_qr"/>
                            <field name="buz_promptpay_id"
                                   attrs="{'invisible': [('buz_receipt_show_qr', '=', False)], 'required': [('buz_receipt_show_qr', '=', True)]}"/>
                            <field name="buz_receipt_footer"/>
                        </group>
                        <group string="Delivery Settings">
                            <field name="buz_enable_delivery"/>
                            <field name="buz_delivery_product_id"
                                   attrs="{'invisible': [('buz_enable_delivery', '=', False)], 'required': [('buz_enable_delivery', '=', True)]}"/>
                        </group>
                    </group>
                    <group>
                        <group string="Display Settings">
                            <field name="buz_show_stock_in_pos"/>
                        </group>
                    </group>
                </page>
            </xpath>
        </field>
    </record>
</odoo>

The Odoo 17 POS config form view doesn't have a `<page>` element with `id='payment_page'`. The view uses a different structure - it uses `<setting>` elements inside `o_settings_container`. Let me look at the full form view to understand the structure better.

content.text: Odoo 17 POS config view ไม่มี `page[@id='payment_page']` — ใช้โครงสร้างแบบ settings ไม่ใช่ notebook pages

content.content: error: tool error: access denied: /var/lib/containerd/io.containerd.snapshotter.v1.overlayfs/snapshots/21/fs/usr/lib/python3/dist-packages/odoo/addons/point_of_sale/views/pos_config_view.xml is outside the project directory /srv/docker/odoo/custom-addons

input.description: Read POS config view from container layer

content.content:
pos.config.form.view pos.config
A session is currently opened for this PoS. Some settings can only be changed after the session is closed.
There is no Chart of Accounts configured on the company. Please go to the invoicing settings to install a Chart of Accounts.
Save this page and come back here to set up the feature.

More settings: Configurations > Settings

pos.config.tree.view pos.config pos.config.search.view pos.config Point of Sale pos.config kanban,tree,form

Create a new PoS

Configure at least one Point of Sale.

Point of Sale List pos.config tree,form

Create a new PoS

Configure at least one Point of Sale.

The Odoo 17 POS config form view doesn't use notebook pages at all - it uses a settings-style layout with `<div class="row mt16 o_settings_container">` and `<setting>` elements. There's no `payment_page` anywhere.

I need to change the xpath to target something that exists. The view has a structure like:
- `<div class="oe_title" id="title">`
- A hidden div for active session warnings
- A div with `id="restaurant_on_create"` for create mode
- A settings container div with settings

The best approach is to append after the settings container div, or insert inside the sheet. Let me target the last `<div class="row mt16 o_settings_container">` (the one that's not in create mode) and add our settings after it.

Actually, looking more carefully, the structure inside `<sheet>` is:
1. widget web_ribbon
2. invisible fields
3. div#title
4. div (hidden in create_mode) - warnings
5. div#restaurant_on_create (create mode settings)
6. div.o_settings_container (hidden in create_mode) - the main settings

I should inject after the last settings container div (item 6). I can use xpath to target the last `div` with class `o_settings_container` that's not `restaurant_on_create`.

A simple approach: target `//div[@class='row mt16 o_settings_container']` and use position="after". But there are two divs with that class. Better to target the specific one.

Actually, let me look at other common approaches. I could target `//setting[@id='other_devices']` with position="after" and then add our own settings block there.

Or I could target the div with `id="restaurant_on_create"` sibling... Actually, the simplest is to target the settings container that's not in create mode and position after it. But since there are two divs with similar class, let me use a more specific xpath.

Looking at the structure again:
- `<div id="restaurant_on_create" class="row mt16 o_settings_container" invisible="not context.get('pos_config_create_mode', False)">` 
- `<div class="row mt16 o_settings_container" invisible="context.get('pos_config_create_mode', False)">`

The second one is the main settings container. I could target it with `//div[hasclass('o_settings_container')][not(@id)]` and use position="after".

But actually, a simpler approach: I should convert the inherited view to use a similar settings-style layout, not notebook pages. The current view is trying to add a `<page>` (notebook page) inside a form that doesn't have a `<notebook>`.

I need to rewrite the view to use the same settings-style layout. I'll insert after the last setting or after the settings container.

Let me rewrite the XML to insert new settings after the existing settings container using `position="after"`.

The simplest xpath: `//div[hasclass('o_settings_container')][last()]` with position="after" - this will add our own settings div after the last settings container.

But we need to make sure it's the right one. Let me use `//div[hasclass('o_settings_container')][not(@id='restaurant_on_create')]` for the non-create-mode container and position="inside" to add settings inside it, or position="after" to add after it.

I think the cleanest approach is to add a new `<div class="row mt16 o_settings_container">` after the existing one, containing our Buz POS settings.

Let me rewrite the view.

content.text:
แก้แล้วครับคุณ Ball

**Root cause:** Odoo 17 POS config form (`pos_config_view_form`) ใช้ settings-style layout (`<div class="o_settings_container">`) ไม่ได้ใช้ `<notebook>` + `<page id="payment_page">` เหมือน Odoo 16

**ที่แก้:** เปลี่ยนจาก `xpath="//page[@id='payment_page']"` เป็น `xpath="//div[hasclass('o_settings_container')][not(@id='restaurant_on_create')]"` แล้วแทรก settings block ต่อท้าย แทนการเปิด page ใหม่

content.text:
แก้แล้วครับ — เปลี่ยน `attrs` เป็น Odoo 17 syntax:

```xml
invisible="buz_receipt_show_qr == False"
required="buz_receipt_show_qr == True"
```

Odoo 17 ใช้ Python expression โดยตรงบน attribute แทน `attrs="{'invisible': [...], 'required': [...]}"` ครับ ลอง restart แล้ว install ใหม่ได้เลย

    <!-- POS Order: Delivery info -->

        <field name="name">pos.order.form.buz.pos.core</field>

        <field name="arch" type="xml">
            <xpath expr="//field[@name='note']" position="after">

                    <field name="buz_delivery_date"/>

                    <field name="buz_delivery_status"

        <field name="name">pos.order.tree.buz.pos.core</field>

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
{
    'name': 'Buz POS Core',
    'version': '17.0.1.0.0',
    'category': 'Point Of Sale',
    'summary': 'Full-featured Retail POS Core with enhanced product screen, multi-payment, and delivery-ready order management',
    'description': """
Buz POS Core
============
Enhanced Retail POS for Odoo 17 with:
- Touchscreen-optimized product screen (category tiles, quick search, barcode)
- Multi-payment support (cash, transfer, card, mix)
- Enhanced receipt (thermal 58mm/80mm, A4, QR PromptPay)
- Order note and line-level discount
- Customer quick-search
- Delivery-ready order flow
- Session X/Z report
- Multi-company support
    """,
    'author': 'Buz',
    'license': 'LGPL-3',
    'website': '',
    'depends': [
        'point_of_sale',
        'stock',
        'account',
        'sale_management',
    ],
    'data': [
        'security/security.xml',
        'security/ir.model.access.csv',
        'data/sequence_data.xml',
        'views/pos_config_views.xml',
        'views/pos_order_views.xml',
        'report/report_session_summary.xml',
    ],
    'assets': {
        'point_of_sale._assets_pos': [
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/css/buz_pos.css',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/js/ProductScreen.js',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/js/PaymentScreen.js',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/js/ReceiptScreen.js',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/js/OrderWidget.js',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/js/models.js',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/xml/ProductScreen.xml',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/xml/PaymentScreen.xml',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/xml/ReceiptScreen.xml',
            'buz_pos_core/static/src/xml/OrderWidget.xml',
        ],
    },
    'application': True,
    'installable': True,
    'auto_install': False,
}

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from . import pos_config
from . import pos_order
from . import pos_session
from . import product_product
from . import res_partner

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from odoo import fields, models


class PosConfig(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'pos.config'

    buz_enable_multi_payment = fields.Boolean(
        string='Allow Multi-Payment',
        default=True,
        help='Allow splitting payment across multiple methods in one order',
    )
    buz_enable_order_note = fields.Boolean(
        string='Allow Order Notes',
        default=True,
    )
    buz_enable_line_discount = fields.Boolean(
        string='Allow Line Discount',
        default=True,
    )
    buz_default_discount = fields.Float(
        string='Default Discount %',
        default=0.0,
    )
    buz_receipt_show_qr = fields.Boolean(
        string='Show QR Code on Receipt',
        default=False,
        help='Display PromptPay QR on receipt for payment',
    )
    buz_promptpay_id = fields.Char(
        string='PromptPay ID (Tax ID or Phone)',
        help='Tax ID or phone number for PromptPay QR generation',
    )
    buz_receipt_footer = fields.Text(
        string='Custom Receipt Footer',
        help='Additional text printed at the bottom of receipt',
    )
    buz_enable_delivery = fields.Boolean(
        string='Enable Delivery',
        default=False,
        help='Show delivery options on POS order',
    )
    buz_delivery_product_id = fields.Many2one(
        'product.product',
        string='Delivery Fee Product',
        domain="[('type', '=', 'service')]",
    )
    buz_show_stock_in_pos = fields.Boolean(
        string='Show Stock Quantity',
        default=False,
        help='Display on-hand quantity on product cards',
    )

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from odoo import fields, models


class PosOrder(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'pos.order'

    buz_order_note = fields.Text(string='Order Note')
    buz_delivery_address = fields.Text(string='Delivery Address')
    buz_delivery_phone = fields.Char(string='Delivery Phone')
    buz_delivery_date = fields.Datetime(string='Delivery Date')
    buz_is_delivery = fields.Boolean(string='Is Delivery Order', default=False)
    buz_delivery_driver_id = fields.Many2one(
        'res.partner', string='Delivery Driver',
        domain="[('buz_is_driver', '=', True)]",
    )
    buz_delivery_status = fields.Selection([
        ('pending', 'Pending'),
        ('assigned', 'Driver Assigned'),
        ('picking', 'Picking Up'),
        ('delivering', 'Delivering'),
        ('delivered', 'Delivered'),
    ], string='Delivery Status', default='pending')
    buz_source = fields.Selection([
        ('walk_in', 'Walk-in'),
        ('phone', 'Phone'),
        ('line', 'LINE'),
        ('online', 'Online'),
        ('other', 'Other'),
    ], string='Order Source', default='walk_in')


class PosOrderLine(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'pos.order.line'

    buz_line_note = fields.Char(string='Line Note')
    buz_line_discount_reason = fields.Char(string='Discount Reason')

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from odoo import fields, models


class PosSession(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'pos.session'

    buz_x_report_printed = fields.Boolean(
        string='X-Report Printed', default=False,
    )

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from odoo import api, fields, models


class ProductProduct(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'product.product'

    buz_pos_sequence = fields.Integer(
        string='POS Display Sequence', default=10,
    )
    buz_is_best_seller = fields.Boolean(
        string='Best Seller', default=False,
    )
    buz_pos_color = fields.Char(
        string='POS Category Color',
        help='Hex color for product card in POS (#RRGGBB)',
    )

    def _get_pos_pos_fields(self):
        """Load additional fields into POS frontend."""
        result = super()._get_pos_pos_fields()
        result.append('buz_pos_sequence')
        result.append('buz_is_best_seller')
        result.append('buz_pos_color')
        return result

# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-

from odoo import fields, models


class ResPartner(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'res.partner'

    buz_is_driver = fields.Boolean(
        string='Is Delivery Driver', default=False,
    )
    buz_driver_license = fields.Char(string='Driver License No.')
    buz_driver_vehicle = fields.Char(string='Vehicle Info')
    buz_loyalty_points = fields.Integer(
        string='Loyalty Points', default=0,
    )
    buz_pos_note = fields.Text(
        string='POS Customer Note',
        help='Internal note shown when selecting this customer in POS',
    )

content.text:
ใช่ครับคุณ Ball — `buz_pos_core` **extend (inherit)** จาก `point_of_sale` ของ Odoo ทั้งหมด ไม่ได้สร้างแยก

สรุปโครงสร้าง:

| Model | ทำอะไร |
|---|---|
| `pos.config` `_inherit` | เพิ่ม settings: multi-payment, order note, line discount, receipt QR PromptPay, delivery, stock display |
| `pos.order` `_inherit` | เพิ่ม: order note, delivery info (address/phone/date/driver/status), order source (walk-in/phone/LINE/online) |
| `pos.order.line` `_inherit` | เพิ่ม: line note, discount reason |
| `pos.session` `_inherit` | เพิ่ม: X-report printed flag |
| `product.product` `_inherit` | เพิ่ม: POS display sequence, best seller flag, category color + override `_get_pos_pos_fields` ส่งไป frontend |
| `res.partner` `_inherit` | เพิ่ม: is_driver, loyalty points, POS customer note |

**ข้อสังเกต:**

1. **`_get_pos_pos_fields`** — method นี้อาจไม่มีใน Odoo 17 แล้ว (Odoo 17 POS ใช้ `load_on_startup` / `.pos` model approach ใหม่) ถ้าเจอ error ตอน load POS จะต้องแก้
2. **JS files** ใน manifest ยังไม่มีไฟล์จริง (`buz_pos.css`, `ProductScreen.js`, `PaymentScreen.js` ฯลฯ) — install backend ผ่านแต่เปิด POS จะ error ขาด assets
3. **`sale_management`** อยู่ใน depends — ถ้าไม่จำเป็นจริง แนะนำเอาออก ไม่งั้นต้อง install เพิ่ม

อยากให้ช่วยตรวจสอบ/สร้าง JS + CSS assets ให้ครบด้วยไหมครับ?
นึกวา่เป็น module standalone

content.content: The user thought buz_pos_core was a standalone module, but it's actually inheriting/extending Odoo's point_of_sale module. They seem surprised. Let me clarify concisely.

content.text:
ไม่ใช่ครับ — `buz_pos_core` เป็น **extension module** ที่ inherit `point_of_sale` ของ Odoo ทุก model:

```python
# ทุกตัวใช้ _inherit ไม่ใช่ _name ใหม่
class PosConfig(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'pos.config'      # ← ต่อจาก Odoo

class PosOrder(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'pos.order'       # ← ต่อจาก Odoo

class ProductProduct(models.Model):
    _inherit = 'product.product' # ← ต่อจาก Odoo
```

ดังนั้น:
- **ต้อง install `point_of_sale` ก่อน** ถึงจะ install `buz_pos_core` ได้
- POS หน้าร้านยังใช้ UI เดิมของ Odoo แต่มี field เพิ่มเติมจาก buz
- เปิด POS ได้จาก Odoo POS ปกติ — ไม่มี separate menu ต่างหาก

ถ้าอยากได้ **standalone POS** แยกจาก Odoo POS ทั้งหมด จะต้องสร้าง model `_name = 'buz.pos.order'` เป็นของตัวเอง และมี frontend ของตัวเองทั้งหมดครับ — แต่นั่นคืองานใหญ่กว่ามาก

อยากให้เก็บไว้แบบ inherit ต่อจาก Odoo POS (เหมือนเดิม) หรืออยากปรับเป็น standalone ครับ?
ok จบ ลบทิ้งเลิก

content.content: The user wants to delete the `buz_pos_core` module entirely. Let me confirm before deleting.

content.text: แน่ใจนะครับ — จะลบโฟลเดอร์ `buz_pos_core` ทั้งก้อน? ลบแล้วกู้คืนไม่ได้ (นอกจาก git)
